'''gafafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaf|loaf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaf|loaf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gafafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæfæfæth|gæfæfæth]] || [[word:gæfæfæj|gæfæfæj]] || [[word:gæfæfæsh|gæfæfæsh]] || [[word:gæfæfæ|gæfæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafafafath|gafafafath]] || [[word:gafafafaj|gafafafaj]] || [[word:gafafafash|gafafafash]] || [[word:gafafafa|gafafafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafafath|gafafath]] || [[word:gafafaj|gafafaj]] || [[word:gafafash|gafafash]] || [[word:gafafa|gafafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafaffath|gafaffath]] || [[word:gafaffaj|gafaffaj]] || [[word:gafaffash|gafaffash]] || [[word:gafaffaf|gafaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gafafatha|gafafatha]] || [[word:gafafaja|gafafaja]] || [[word:gafafasha|gafafasha]] || [[word:gafafaka|gafafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gafafath|gafafath]] || [[word:gafafaj|gafafaj]] || [[word:gafafash|gafafash]] || [[word:gafafa|gafafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gafafathal|gafafathal]] || [[word:gafafajal|gafafajal]] || [[word:gafafashal|gafafashal]] || [[word:gafafakal|gafafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gafafathatha|gafafathatha]] || [[word:gafafajaja|gafafajaja]] || [[word:gafafashasha|gafafashasha]] || [[word:gafafaka|gafafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gafafathan|gafafathan]] || [[word:gafafajan|gafafajan]] || [[word:gafafashan|gafafashan]] || [[word:gafafakan|gafafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gafafathaoro|gafafathaoro]] || [[word:gafafajaoro|gafafajaoro]] || [[word:gafafashaoro|gafafashaoro]] || [[word:gafafakaoro|gafafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
